title: Surgeon Vacancy at RML Hospital Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at RML Hospital Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
RML Hospital Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Kochi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About RML Hospital Holdings Services:
RML Hospital Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RML Hospital Holdings Services!
